title: November 24, 2014 – Nicholas Galanin
summary: Tlingit/Aleut multi-instrumentalist Nicholas Galanin from Sitka, Alaska is also known as Silver Jackson or Indian Nick. Both a recording artist and visual artist, he runs the record label Home Skillet Records along with the Home Skillet fes tival. Three years in the making, Galanin’s latest album “S...
